title: Microwave Assisted, Fly Ash Catalyzed Synthesis of Coumarin Derivatives: Green Approach
author: J Hebade, Madhav
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Solvent free synthesis of substituted Coumarin by Von Pechmann condensation of phenols with β-ketoesters catalyzed by fly ash as a byproduct from thermal power station by microwave irradiation method. Our present protocol is economical and clean comprise of green reagent, solvent and catalyst.
steps_raw: Solvent free synthesis of substituted Coumarin by Von Pechmann condensation of phenols with β-ketoesters catalyzed by fly ash as a byproduct from thermal power station by microwave irradiation method. Our present protocol is economical and clean comprise of green reagent, solvent and catalyst.
keywords: Pechmann Condensation; Coumarin; MWI; Green Synthesis
